name: Abdelfatah Ashour
headline: Crafting calm, thoughtful interfaces for the web.
bio: A frontend engineer who grows with people, teams, and the craft of the web.
I care about clarity in code and quiet confidence in the products people touch every day — interfaces that feel considered, not crowded.
Most of my work lives in React and Next.js, where I turn product intent into screens that stay calm, fast, and maintainable as they grow.
